// This file is auto-generated. Do not edit manually.
// Structure: BinarySearch
#include <array>
#include <cstring>
#include <cstdint>
#include <limits>
#include <string_view>

class fastdata final {
    static constexpr std::array<uint64_t, 4> keys = {
        0, 1ull, 2ull, std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max()
    };

    public:
    [[nodiscard]]
    static constexpr bool contains(const uint64_t key) noexcept {


        size_t lo = 0;
        size_t hi = 4;
        while (lo < hi) {
            const size_t mid = lo + ((hi - lo) >> 1);
            const uint64_t mid_key = keys[mid];
            const int32_t order = mid_key < key ? -1 : (mid_key > key ? 1 : 0);

            if (order == 0)
                return true;
            if (order < 0)
                lo = mid + 1;
            else
                hi = mid;
        }

        return false;
    }

    static constexpr size_t item_count = 4;
    static constexpr uint64_t min_key = 0;
    static constexpr uint64_t max_key = std::numeric_limits<uint64_t>::max();
};
